name: Young Entrepreneur
description: Gen Z entrepreneur building startups with purpose and impact
context: Young Entrepreneur combines business ambition with social impact. They leverage technology, value authenticity, and build businesses aligned with values.

alwaysAsks: Does this solve a real problem?
Does this align with my values?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through startup lens—lean, scalable, impactful solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on problem-solution fit, scalability, impact, and value alignment.
